name: Spaghetti Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the spaghetti according to package instructions and drain.
2. In a bowl, blend together the milk and egg.
3. Add the cooked spaghetti to the milk and egg mixture and toss until evenly coated.
4. Spray a 15 x 18 inch pan with vegetable cooking spray.
5. Spread the spaghetti mixture in the prepared pan.
6. Brown the ground beef, onion, and green pepper in a skillet until no longer raw.
7. Add the tomato sauce and Italian seasoning to the skillet and simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Pour the sauce mixture over the spaghetti in the pan.
9. Top with sliced mushrooms and shredded mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
